bio.heading: Bio
bio.p1: Meagan is a backend developer from Montreal. They have been building products at Petal Health since 2021. After completing a BFA from Concordia University in Computation Arts in 2019, they completed a bootcamp at Le Wagon in 2020.
bio.p2: Outside of the capitalist rat race, they enjoy powerlifting, crafting, nail art, and cuddling with their cat.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.avocadoDesc: : Landing page for local sushi restaurant. Created with GatsbyJS.

studiesPage.title: Studies
studiesPage.subtitlePart1: Micro projects to learn new skills and practice old ones. Project ideas from
weatherBullets: API that returns the data interesting to me from a third party API
Implemented Redis to practice setting up and utilizing a cache
Set up a Node server for the first time
Practice with setting up a logger (in this case, Winston) and using it efficiently
expenseBullets: Expense tracker app with basic UI
Set up authentication and JWT token configuration for the first time (main goal of the project)
